race.description: Delegate Station Delegate Monaro Cup CB (Bm58) Hcp
race.comment: SHYAMALAN (2) progressive gelding who finds a winnable race today with the claim. Jumped in trip with the 58.5kg when he sat on the fast tempo to finish a narrow fourth over 1600m at Queanbeyan as favourite in C3 grade. Stalks the speed here and will prove hard to hold out. WILL THE THINKER (3) was too good for a Maiden field at start four in the heavy (9) going with a game win over 1600m at Nowra. Has the upside to keep the winning momentum going. EXCEED SUCCESS (5) in career best form and can rinse and repeat today after getting the job done over 1650m at Moruya. Winning rider sticks and deserves respect. REVOKE (12) tricky map for this and has minor place prospects.
